title: Ensure lichen_coap_format_ipv6 prevents stack overflow and updates ipv6_buf sizes per Kconfig
description: Review lichen_coap_format_ipv6 for stack safety (in6_addr, net_addr_ntop), ensure all callers use sufficient buf_size > LICHEN_CONFIG_ADDR_MAX_LEN if needed, update buffers in coap_status.c if required. Prevent any partial string writes.
